title: Pokemania Cobblemon
description:
Experimente o Cobblemon no seu melhor com este Modpack para o Cobblemon Pokemania!
O servidor incluído neste pacote conta com TODOS os modelos de Pokémon, além de Megas, Z-Moves, Terastalização, Raids, Cosméticos e muito mais!
body:
![,](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876b73f43ee6aba06713da59c450e14c0553a9b4.png)
[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69954b5bbda433070f02c1f257af7d67eaf8ae9f.png)](https://discord.gg/YSZuNATUDW)
[![loja](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb70e7879c9111db5dadadc5a498a96c2de3ac1c.png)](https://www.pokemania.com.br)

# Portugues
Pokémon no Minecraft! Viva a melhor experiência do Cobblemon com este Modpack de servidor para o Cobblemon Pokemania!
O servidor incluído neste pacote apresenta TODOS os modelos de Pokémon, além de Megas, Z-Moves, Terastalização, Raids, e muito mais!

# English
Pokémon in Minecraft! Experience Cobblemon at its finest with this Server Modpack for Cobblemon Pokemania!
The server included in this pack features EVERY Pokémon model, along with Megas, Z-Moves, Terastalization, Raids, and much more!
